evidence.quote: Signal’s advanced privacy-preserving technology is always enabled, so you can focus on sharing the moments that matter with the people who matter to you.
Signal is a simple, powerful, and secure messenger that uses your phone's data connection (WiFi/3G/4G/5G) to communicate securely.
